title: Grammy Awards 2026: Betting Odds & Record of the Year Analysis
text: The 68th Grammy Awards take place February 1, 2026, at Crypto.com Arena, with betting markets heavily favoring Kendrick Lamar and Bad Bunny for major honors. Luther (Kendrick Lamar feat. SZA) emerges as the overwhelming favorite at -150. The collaboration has maintained significant momentum, "spending 13 weeks at No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100." Industry analysts emphasize that the track demonstrates strong production quality and "appeal directly to the Recording Academy's notoriously hard-to-please technical voters." Lady Gaga's "Abracadabra" sits at +250, while Bad Bunny's "DtMF" carries +340 odds. The article notes that Kendrick Lamar leads overall with nine nominations, positioning him well for multiple category wins. His track record following last year's Grammy success has strengthened voter confidence in his current work. Bad Bunny's "Debí Tirar Más Fotos" is favored for Album of the Year (-150), which would mark a historic moment as the first Spanish-language project to claim that prize, supported by recent Academy voting rule changes. Olivia Dean dominates Best New Artist betting at -340 odds, described as "An industry darling since the release of The Art of Loving" with appeal to voters favoring "timeless singer-songwriters."
